# remek

> remek is an open-source, local-first governance and release layer for completed Agent Skills.

remek binds provenance, policy, evaluation evidence, approval, exact change plans,
and release manifests to exact skill bytes. It does not author skills, execute
candidates, run providers, install consumer copies, commit, push, publish, or
change repository visibility.

## Documentation

- [Website](https://remek.dev/): Product overview, workflow, proof, and installation.
- [Source repository](https://github.com/benblackthorn/remek): Source code, tests, documentation, and releases.
- [README](https://github.com/benblackthorn/remek/blob/main/README.md): User-facing setup and workflow reference.
- [Design](https://github.com/benblackthorn/remek/blob/main/docs/design.md): Product outcomes and semantic ownership.
- [Contracts](https://github.com/benblackthorn/remek/blob/main/docs/contracts.md): Formats, lifecycle, and observable behavior.
- [Threat model](https://github.com/benblackthorn/remek/blob/main/docs/threat-model.md): Trust boundaries and supported environments.
- [Latest release](https://github.com/benblackthorn/remek/releases/latest): Current published remek version.

## Inspectable proof

- [Governed remek records](https://github.com/benblackthorn/remek/tree/main/.remek/skills/remek): Public first-party governance records.
- [Public Agent Skills catalog](https://github.com/benblackthorn/agent-skills): Consumer-facing skills released from a separate governed source.
- [Catalog release manifest](https://github.com/benblackthorn/agent-skills/blob/main/release-manifest.json): Exact projected payload and lineage binding.
- [Standalone manifest verifier](https://github.com/benblackthorn/remek/blob/main/tools/verify_release_manifest.py): Dependency-free released-mirror verification.

## Optional

- [Agent Skills specification](https://agentskills.io/): The open format remek governs and releases.
- [MIT license](https://github.com/benblackthorn/remek/blob/main/LICENSE): License for remek.
